description: Accounts in Judaeo-Arabic listing various debts. Mentioning names such as Abū Naṣr b. Hilāl, al-Dimashqī, Barakāt b. Sālim, Abū l-Faḍl b. Nat[an] and Musallam Ibn al-Naʿja. There seems to be an interlinear date, probably Tammuz 1465 of the Seleucid Era (= June/July 1154 CE) (Information in part from CUDL)
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
